questions.text: Which of these is a Rabi crop?
questions.explanation: Wheat is a Rabi crop (sown in winter). Rice, maize, and soybean are Kharif crops (sown in rainy season).

questions.text: Green manure enriches soil with nitrogen.
questions.explanation: Green manure is prepared by ploughing green plants into the soil. Leguminous plants add nitrogen to soil.

questions.correctAnswer: Crossing between genetically dissimilar plants to obtain improved varieties.
questions.explanation: Hybridization is the crossing of two different varieties to combine desirable traits from both parents.

questions.text: The practice of rearing fish on large scale is called ________.
questions.explanation: Pisciculture is the breeding, rearing, and transplantation of fish by artificial means.
